title: FedRAMP 20x CLI Evidence Output
description: Machine-readable schema for per-KSI CLI evidence artifacts (cli_output.json). Each file is an array of command execution records capturing the raw AWS CLI output, execution metadata, and redacted evidence for a single KSI validation.

attempted.description: Whether the command was actually executed (false if skipped by circuit breaker)

stdout_digest.description: SHA-256 digest of the raw stdout (for integrity verification without exposing secrets)

stderr.description: Standard error output from the command (empty on success)

raw_output.description: Parsed JSON output from the CLI command (redacted of sensitive values). Structure varies by AWS service.

command_timeout.description: Whether the command was terminated due to timeout

cli_command.description: The CLI command that was executed

validation_id.description: KSI identifier this evidence belongs to

command_note.description: Context tag from the CLI command register explaining the purpose of this command

command_index.description: Zero-based index of this command within the KSI's command list

ksi_description.description: Description of the parent KSI requirement
